nodes.name: 峡谷峭壁
nodes.summary: 大型猛禽和食腐鸟偏好的高崖栖息环境。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Little rock thrush
nodes.summary: Little rock thrush（Little rock thrush，学名 Monticola rufocinereus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，常见栖息地包括峡谷峭壁。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It is found in Eritrea, Ethiopia, Kenya, Oman, Saudi Arabia, Somalia, South Sudan, Tanzania, Uganda, and Yemen. It is found in rocky (inland cliffs and mountain peaks) areas with some trees, and sometimes near settlements.{{cite book |last1=Aerts |first1=R
